chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8047 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.35235/2018 2. For hearing of main case 17.02.2025 Mr. Haris Rashid Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition agitates the issue of deduction of withholding tax, however, with respect to tax year 2019. Admittedly, the tax return for the said fiscal year was filed and any adjustment etc. for withholding tax had to have been made therein. Per learned Assistant Attorney General, the lis has prima facie dissipated and become infructuous with the filing to the tax returns of the relevant year. Learned counsel for the petitioner articulated no cavil in such regard. In view hereof this petition appears to have become infructuous, hence, is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
